name: Make-Their-Own-Pizza
recipeIngredient: Refrigerator biscuit or roll dough (allow 2 rolls per child)
16 oz jar good quality spaghetti sauce
Freshly grated mozzarella and parmesan cheese, mixed
Other toppings such as green peppers, grated carrot, etc.
recipeInstructions:
1. In advance of the party, roll out the biscuits or rolls very flat between sheets of waxed paper and store them on a cookie sheet in the refrigerator.
2. When it's time to bake, set the oven to the temperature specified on the dough package (usually 350-425°F).
3. Pour the sauce into a bowl that can be reached by all participants.
4. Set out the cheese and other toppings (anything you think the kids will like, or nothing if you think plain cheese is enough).
5. Give each child 2 pizzas on a paper plate.
6. Provide spoons for each child to assemble their own pizzas with sauce, cheese, and toppings of their choice.
7. Collect the assembled pizzas, place them on baking sheets, and arrange in order to identify whose pizza belongs to whom.
